heroHeadline: Day 41: Pentagon Undercounting US Casualties, The Intercept Reports; Lebanon Fronts Active
heroSubtitle: Trump pressures NATO allies over Iran ceasefire framework following Rutte talks, while Iran state media claims Hormuz closed and US military remains positioned near Iran.
footerNote: Data updated 2026-04-09. Sources include CENTCOM, IDF, IRNA, IAEA, Hengaw, HRANA, Al Jazeera, Anadolu Agency, Reuters, Associated Press, CNN, CNBC, Bloomberg, IEA, DW, The Intercept, Pakistani Foreign Ministry, Washington Post, Financial Times, AgoraVox, The Guardian, BBC, New York Times, Fox News, Military.com, Wall Street Journal.
